creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 183920
patch against the ports tree

Since the last update of math/eigen3 to 3.3.4 graphics/code-eli fails to build. After contacting kde@ (maintainer of math/eigen3) some improvements were made but the port still does not fully build (it builds deactivating the static asserts, so something deeper is going on).

Until this is worked out, I prefer to mark the port as BROKEN.

An issue has been opened upstream: https://github.com/ddmarshall/Code-Eli/issues/56
